name: BELGENO
definition:
-- =============================================
-- Author:  <Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description: <belgenoya nc yazma>
-- =============================================
CREATE TRIGGER BELGENO 
   ON  LG_001_01_INVOICE
   AFTER INSERT,UPDATE
AS 

DECLARE @INVLOGI INT
DECLARE @INVDOCODE NVARCHAR(11)
DECLARE @SPECODE NVARCHAR(11)
DECLARE @TRCODE SMALLINT

SELECT @INVLOGI=LOGICALREF FROM inserted
SELECT @INVDOCODE=DOCODE FROM inserted
SELECT @TRCODE=TRCODE FROM inserted
SELECT @SPECODE=SPECODE FROM inserted

IF (@SPECODE='GR')


BEGIN
      UPDATE LG_001_01_INVOICE SET EINVOICE=0,FICHENO='GR'+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,LOGICALREF),VATEXCEPTCODE='301',VATEXCEPTREASON='KDV' WHERE LOGICALREF=@INVLOGI
 

END


--select VATEXCEPTCODE,VATEXCEPTREASON* from lg_001_01_INVOICE
